overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a red coat walking along a coastal trail at night. The character approaches and passes a wooden barricade before descending along a cliff path toward the ocean, with rocky formations and grass lining the route.

events.description: character slows slightly as they approach the wooden barricade structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the wooden barricade ahead

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face lining the left side of the path
wooden log barrier blocking the path ahead
narrow dirt trail with scattered stones
warm light source near the barricade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail at night, flanked by a large rock cliff on the left and grassy slopes on the right. Ahead, a wooden barricade blocks the path, with a warm lantern glowing nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff passage with ocean view opening

events.description: passes through the wooden barricade into the narrow coastal cliff passage
ocean becomes visible between the rock formations ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the barricade and continuing along the path as the coastal view opens up

entered.detail: rocky cliff face closing in on the right side of the path
distant ocean visible between the coastal rock formations
tall isolated rock formation rising from the sea

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the wooden barricade into a narrower passage between rock walls. The grassy slopes give way to rocky cliffs on both sides, and the ocean becomes visible in the distance ahead, with a tall sea stack rising from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge descending toward rocky shoreline

events.description: path begins descending more steeply toward the ocean shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking downhill along the cliff edge path toward the rocky shore and ocean waves

entered.detail: dark ocean waves visible along the right side of the path
rocky beach area at the base of the cliff
narrow trail along the cliff edge with loose stones

segments.scene_description: The path continues descending along the cliff edge, with the ocean now visible directly to the right. The character approaches the rocky shoreline where waves meet the coast, while the left rock cliff recedes slightly into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime coastal trail that transitions from a sheltered dirt path into an open, rocky shoreline. It begins with the character walking between a towering rock cliff and grassy slopes toward a wooden barricade illuminated by a warm lantern. As the character passes through the barricade, the environment narrows into a passage between steep rock walls before opening up to reveal a distant sea stack rising from the ocean. The scene then shifts as the path descends along the cliff edge, bringing the ocean into direct view on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the rocky shoreline where the waves meet the coast and the cliffside recedes into the background.
